sentences.target: Ton comportement me met mal à l'aise.

translations.fr: Ton comportement me met mal à l'aise.
translations.it: Il tuo comportamento mi mette a disagio.
translations.vi: Hành vi của bạn khiến tôi khó chịu.
translations.uk: Твоя поведінка змушує мене почуватися ніяково.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा व्यवहार मुझे असहज करता है.
translations.pl: Twoje zachowanie sprawia, że czuję się nieswojo.
translations.el: Η συμπεριφορά σου με κάνει να νιώθω άβολα.
translations.id: Perilaku kamu membuat saya tidak nyaman.
translations.ro: Comportamentul tău mă face să mă simt inconfortabil.
translations.ja: あなたの行動は私を不快にさせます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular) modifying 'comportement'; marks possession.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase; means 'behavior'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular) functioning as the direct object of 'met'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present of 'mettre'); takes DO 'me' and idiomatic complement 'mal à l'aise'.
Adverb of manner; part of the idiom 'mettre [qqn] mal à l'aise' expressing discomfort.
Preposition introducing the noun 'aise' in the fixed phrase 'à l'aise'.
Definite article (elided before vowel); attached to 'aise' in 'à l'aise'.
Noun meaning 'ease'; complements the preposition 'à' in the idiom.

sentences.target: Je n'aime pas son comportement au travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nɛm pa sɔ̃ kɔ̃pɔʁtəmɑ̃ o tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Je n'aime pas son comportement au travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nɛm pa sɔ̃ kɔ̃pɔʁtəmɑ̃ o tʁavaj/
translations.en: I don’t like their behavior at work.
translations.es: No me gusta su comportamiento en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich mag das Verhalten dieser Person bei der Arbeit nicht.
translations.it: Non mi piace il suo comportamento al lavoro.
translations.ko: 나는 직장에서 그 사람의 행동이 마음에 들지 않는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不喜欢他在工作时的表现。
translations.yue: 我唔鍾意佢喺工作上嘅表現。
translations.ru: Мне не нравится поведение этого человека на работе.
translations.pt: Não gosto do comportamento dessa pessoa no trabalho.
translations.he: אני לא אוהב את ההתנהגות שלו בעבודה.
translations.vi: Tôi không thích cách cư xử của người đó tại nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: سلوك هذا الشخص في العمل لا يعجبني.
translations.nl: Ik houd niet van het gedrag van die persoon op het werk.
translations.uk: Мені не подобається поведінка цієї людини на роботі.
translations.hu: Nem tetszik a viselkedése a munkahelyen.
translations.hi: मुझे उसके काम पर व्यवहार पसंद नहीं है.
translations.pl: Nie podoba mi się zachowanie tej osoby w pracy.
translations.el: Δεν μου αρέσει η συμπεριφορά αυτού του ατόμου στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg liker ikke oppførselen til vedkommende på jobb.
translations.id: Saya tidak suka perilakunya di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Jag gillar inte den personens beteende på jobbet.
translations.ro: Nu îmi place comportamentul acelei persoane la serviciu.
translations.cs: Nelíbí se mi chování té osoby v práci.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke lide den persons adfærd på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場でのその人の態度が好きではありません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular).
Negation particle 'ne' elided before vowel; first part of 'ne ... pas'.
Main verb (1st person singular present of 'aimer').
Adverb; second part of the negation 'ne ... pas'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) modifying 'comportement'.
Noun; direct object of 'aime'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le'; introduces the locative complement 'au travail'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'au', indicating context/location.

sentences.target: On discute du comportement des enfants.

translations.fr: On discute du comportement des enfants.
translations.en: We’re talking about the kids’ behavior.
translations.es: Estamos hablando del comportamiento de los niños.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über das Verhalten der Kinder.
translations.it: Stiamo parlando del comportamento dei bambini.
translations.ko: 우리는 아이들의 행동에 대해 이야기하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在讨论孩子们的行为。
translations.yue: 我哋喺討論啲小朋友嘅行為。
translations.pt: Estamos falando sobre o comportamento das crianças.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về hành vi của bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: We praten over het gedrag van de kinderen.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के व्यवहार के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για τη συμπεριφορά των παιδιών.
translations.ja: 子どもたちの行動について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal pronoun often used as 'we'; subject of the clause.
Main verb (3rd person singular present of 'discuter').
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le'; introduces the noun 'comportement' (topic/complement).
Noun; complement governed by the preposition 'du'.
Definite plural article contracted with 'de'; determiner for 'enfants'.
Plural noun; completes the NP 'des enfants' as complement within 'du comportement des enfants'.

translations.de: Mein Verhalten zu ändern hilft mir.
translations.it: Cambiare il mio comportamento mi aiuta.
translations.ko: 내 행동을 바꾸는 것이 나에게 도움이 된다.
translations.zh-Hans: 改变我的行为能帮助我。
translations.yue: 改變我嘅行為對我有幫助。
translations.vi: Thay đổi hành vi của tôi giúp tôi.
translations.nl: Het veranderen van mijn gedrag helpt mij.
translations.hi: अपना व्यवहार बदलना मेरी मदद करता है.
translations.el: Η αλλαγή της συμπεριφοράς μου με βοηθά.
translations.nb: Å endre atferden min hjelper meg.
translations.sv: Att förändra mitt beteende hjälper mig.
translations.da: At ændre min adfærd hjælper mig.
translations.ja: 自分の行動を変えることは私に役立ちます。

tokens.explanation: Infinitive verb functioning as the subject of the clause.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular) modifying 'comportement'.
Noun; direct object of the infinitive 'Changer'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular) elided before vowel; direct object of 'aide'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present of 'aider'); its subject is the infinitival clause 'Changer mon comportement'.
